listings.name: MAHJ CLUB — Long Beach
listings.description: 30+ years experience teaching American and Chinese Mahjong. Offers beginner series, one-time workshops, 1:1 coaching, community events, private parties, and classes across California.
listings.notes: Open Mon-Sun 8 AM-10 PM.

listings.name: East Never Loses
listings.venueName: Various (Hauser & Wirth, Fatty Mart, Open Market, dive bars)
listings.description: Authentic reclamation and revitalization of Mahjong for a new generation. Taiwanese American (16-tile) style. Monthly parties across LA — LGBTQ+ and third culture adults community. QQ Academy: free admission if you bring someone from a different generation.
listings.notes: Featured in Vice, Dazed. Club Fatty (Fatty Mart, Mar Vista) hosts first Sunday of each month.

listings.name: Griffin Club LA — Mah Jongg Lessons
listings.description: 6-week Mah Jongg lesson series at private club. Intro 10 AM-12 PM, Continuing 12:30-2:30 PM. Includes lunch, instruction, and cards. Limited to 8 people per class.
listings.notes: Next session: April 11 - May 16, 2026. Private club — membership or guest access required.

listings.name: LA LA Mahjong
listings.description: First West Coast chapter of THE MAHJONG LEAGUE. Certified instructor Lisa Cornwell runs 101/102 classes, league play, NMJL card reviews, and events. Very active community.

listings.name: LA Mahjong League
listings.venueName: Mandarin Plaza / Steep Tea Shop + rotating
listings.description: 16-tile Taiwanese Mahjong league with house rules and point system. Multiple game times across LA. All levels welcome.

listings.name: LAPL — Introduction to Mah Jongg Classes
listings.description: Free 2-week Introduction to Mah Jongg classes at LAPL branches. Meets first two Tuesdays of most months. Registration required at Reference Desk. Experienced players teach newcomers.
listings.notes: Also has open play on 2nd and 4th Wednesdays.

listings.name: LAPL — Mah Jongg Open Play
listings.description: Free open play at LAPL branches on the 2nd and 4th Wednesday of each month. New and established players welcome.
listings.notes: Check lapl.org for branch-specific schedules.

listings.name: Lucky Bamboo Mahjong Club
listings.address: 418 Bamboo Ln A, Los Angeles, CA
listings.description: Monthly Hong Kong-style (13 tiles) mahjong night on the 2nd Friday. Small, quiet, well-lit Chinatown space. Optional beginner instruction at 7 PM and 8 PM. All materials supplied.
listings.notes: RSVP required — no walk-ins.

listings.name: Mahjong Mistress
listings.contactName: Angela Lin, Abby Wu, Susan Koulavongsa, Zoé Blue M
listings.description: Woman-run collective focused on educating people about Mahjong through social gatherings. Taiwanese American (16-tile) style. Grew from 40 people at first party to 200+ at warehouse events. Featured in Vice.

listings.notes: Instagram/Facebook lead — need to find current handles. | Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: Mahjong Underground at General Lee's

listings.howToJoin: Just show up on Thursday nights
listings.notes: Free entry — drink purchases optional. Great for beginners.

listings.name: Mahjong Underground at Nico's Wine Bar

listings.name: 144 Tiles Mahjong Club — Hong Kong Style (Chinatown)

Currently meeting in West Loop; planning to shift to Chinatown restaurants to support the neighborhood. Aimed at younger players who want to connect with the game's Chinese cultural significance.

listings.name: Big Card Open Play at Gangnam Market (The Mahjong Society)
listings.description: Open play session exploring The Big Card from The Mahjong Line. Light guidance but not a lesson. All supplies included. Great food from Gangnam Market available. Perfect for players who know the basics and want to try the new card.
listings.notes: Jan 18 and Jan 25 2026 confirmed. Check TMS calendar for future Big Card events.

listings.name: Blue Tiger Mahj Club — Western Suburbs Lessons & Events
listings.description: Premier western suburbs teaching club with 2,000+ students. Beginner lessons, guided play, open play, social leagues, and special events. Certified NMJL rules instructor (Mahj Life Instructor Guild). Uses Oh My Mahjong sets. Private group lessons in client homes also available.
listings.notes: Formerly The Mahjong Guild. Multiple public events and private lessons nearly every day. Check Eventbrite for current calendar.

listings.name: Bring a Beginner at Midwest Coast Brewing (The Mahjong Society)
listings.description: Hosts special pair events (one experienced + one beginner) and holiday open play nights. Beginner learns 101 while experienced friend plays open tables; then play together after. Also site of Holiday Open Play with treats and giveaways.
listings.notes: Apr 30 2026 Bring a Beginner confirmed. Also hosted Holiday Open Play Dec 2025. Check TMS calendar. | Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: Chi City Mahjong (Missy Mahjong) — Free Lessons & Open Play
listings.generalArea: City-wide (Gold Coast, East Bank Club, 900 N Michigan)
listings.description: Free social mahjong club offering lessons and open play across Chicago's Gold Coast and upscale venues. OMM certified instructor based in Nashville who hosts Chicago pop-ups. Beginner table + open play at every event. Modern & traditional tiles, alternative cards welcome. If you'd like to pay it forward, donate to The Service Club of Chicago.
listings.notes: Events fill quickly — join waitlist via email. Nashville-based instructor travels to Chicago regularly.

listings.name: Chicago Public Library — Mahjong Club (Clearing Branch)

listings.howToJoin: Register online at ActiveCommunities (jcprd.com) or call 913-831-3359.
listings.notes: 4 sessions, 2 hrs each. $62 residents / $68 nonresidents. 2026 series: Feb 4, Mar 4, Apr 8 (all Wednesdays 1pm). Open to 18+ (50+ program).

listings.name: JCPRD Tiles and Tulips Mah Jongg Party
listings.address: 551 New Century Pkwy, New Century, KS 66031
listings.description: Annual spring themed mah jongg party for adults 50+. Players rotate tables and track wins - no bracket play. Festive lunch included. Pre-registration required.
listings.howToJoin: Register in advance via jcprd.com or call 913-831-3359. Must register before event.
listings.notes: April 28, 2026 at New Century Fieldhouse. Pricing TBD - check jcprd.com for registration details.

listings.name: KC Mahjong Club - Learn to Play at Olive Tree

listings.name: KC Mahjong Club - Moonlight Mahjong at Olive Tree

listings.howToJoin: Register via Olive Tree KC calendar

listings.name: KC Mahjong Club - Weekly Open Play (Rotating Venues)

listings.howToJoin: Reserve via SignUpGenius. Can cancel up to 24 hrs in advance by texting 816-665-9938.
listings.notes: Multiple sessions weekly. $15/person. Must know how to play - not a lesson.

listings.name: KC Mahjong Club at Blair & Blythe

listings.name: KC Riichi Mahjong Club - Weekly Open Play

listings.name: OK Let's Mahjong - Kansas City Social Play Night

listings.name: Olive Tree KC – Open Play Mahjong

listings.name: The Bam Bam Room KC - Mahjong 101 + 102 Lessons

listings.name: The Bam Bam Room KC - Open Play

listings.howToJoin: Book online at thebambamroomkc.com or email hello@thebambamroomkc.com

listings.name: The JKC Heritage - Learn to Play Mah Jongg

listings.name: The JKC Heritage - Weekly Mah Jongg (55+)

listings.notes: Wednesdays 12:30pm. For 55+. Christie Thomas Collier instructs. New players welcome - brief lesson before play.

listings.name: Cornell Mah Jong Club
listings.description: Student-led club introducing mah-jong to the Cornell community. Focuses on leisure, socializing, and developing logical thinking.
listings.notes: University recreational organization

listings.name: Lancaster Public Library — Mahjong Club
listings.description: Free Wednesday morning Chinese mahjong at the Lancaster Public Library. No registration needed — just drop in and play! Part of the Buffalo & Erie County Public Library system.
listings.howToJoin: Drop in any Wednesday morning at 10:00 AM. No registration required.
listings.source: Web Research / Buffalo & Erie County Public Library
listings.notes: Chinese mahjong. Free, drop-in, no registration required.

listings.name: Lancaster Senior Center — Monday Mahjong
listings.description: Weekly Monday morning mahjong at the Lancaster Senior Center, serving the eastern Buffalo suburbs.
listings.howToJoin: Contact Lancaster Senior Center at (716) 685-3498 to confirm schedule.
listings.notes: Verify current schedule by calling the senior center.

listings.name: Casual Dragon Mahjong Club
listings.description: Dedicated mahjong room with automatic shuffling table. Saturday open play 12-9 PM and Tuesday learn-to-play sessions at 5 PM. Focus on Chinese mahjong with some Japanese Riichi play. Teaching sessions on first Saturday and first Tuesday of each month.
listings.notes: Teaching sessions on 1st Saturday and 1st Tuesday of month; about 45 min west of Rochester

listings.name: Casual Dragon Mahjong Club — Riichi Saturdays & Teaching Sessions
listings.description: One of Western New York's most serious riichi mahjong destinations! Casual Dragon Mahjong Club meets every Saturday for a full day of Japanese riichi play, with teaching sessions on the first Saturday and first Tuesday of each month. Score tracking year-round, special tournaments, and a dedicated mahjong room with auto-table.
listings.howToJoin: Show up Saturday 12 PM–9 PM. Teaching sessions on 1st Saturday and 1st Tuesday. Contact casualdragonmahjong@gmail.com.
listings.source: Web Research / Reach Mahjong of New York
listings.notes: Japanese riichi mahjong. Teaching sessions: 1st Sat + 1st Tue. Tournaments: Doragon no Taikai, Cheater's Tourney, Team Tournament.

listings.name: Macedon Public Library Mahjong
listings.description: All skill levels welcome including beginners. No pre-registration required. The library supplies tiles and provides a welcoming community atmosphere. A wonderful way to learn and enjoy the game.

listings.name: 14th Street Y — Mah Jongg Club Open Play
listings.description: Weekly open play for experienced Mah Jongg players. Tables and sets provided. No instruction — players should already know the game.
listings.notes: Registration required — no walk-ins.

listings.name: 92nd Street Y — Beginner's Mah Jongg
listings.description: Beginner's Mah Jongg class covering fundamental components including pieces, rules, and playing strategy. Mah Jongg card included.
listings.notes: Classes have historically sold out quickly. Check website for upcoming availability. | Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: Bonnie's Mah Jongg Table — Lessons
listings.description: Mah Jongg lessons and instruction in the NYC area.

listings.name: Brotherhood Synagogue — Mah Jongg
listings.description: Weekly Wednesday evening Mah Jongg at an inclusive, egalitarian Conservative Jewish congregation in Gramercy Park. Cash at the door.
listings.howToJoin: Show up on Wednesday evenings (except holidays)
listings.notes: No games on holidays.

listings.name: Bryant Park Mah Jongg Social
listings.address: Between 40th & 42nd St and 5th & 6th Ave, New York, NY
listings.description: Free outdoor Mah Jongg social every Thursday afternoon in the summer, running since 2012. Hosted on the 5th Avenue Terrace in front of the New York Public Library. National Mah Jongg League rules. 30-50 players typically attend.
listings.howToJoin: Just show up on Thursdays during summer season (approx. May-September)
listings.whatToBring: Your own set if you have one, or borrow from others
listings.notes: Seasonal — runs approximately May through September. Also hosts Winter Mah Jongg Social and Holiday Marathons.

listings.name: Chaotic Good Cafe — Mahjong Lessons
listings.description: Beginner mahjong lessons at a cozy Upper West Side cafe. Options include American Mahjong and Hong Kong Mahjong beginner lessons. Also hosts Greenwich Mahjong Club 5-part MAHJONG 101 beginner series. Learn alongside ~15 other participants.
listings.howToJoin: Book via Eventbrite (search 'Chaotic Good Cafe mahjong')
listings.whatToBring: Nothing — sets, tiles, racks, and cards all provided
listings.notes: Multiple class types: American beginner, Hong Kong beginner, American intermediate. Also hosts Greenwich Mahjong Club series.

listings.name: Charlie Bird — Mahjong & Brunch
listings.description: Learn mahjong while enjoying acclaimed Italian brunch at Charlie Bird. Partnered with So Bam Fun. Events sell out quickly.
listings.howToJoin: Book through Seven Rooms platform on the restaurant website
listings.notes: Upcoming dates: March 8, March 29, April 12, April 19, 2026. Sells out fast — book early. | Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: Chop Suey Club — Mahjong Room
listings.description: Asian lifestyle boutique with a private mahjong room on the lower level. Two tables seating two parties at a time. $100/hour for 4 players ($25/person). Full room reservation with karaoke available. BYOB, free soft drinks included. Instructor available at $160/hour.
listings.whatToBring: Nothing — mahjong set and accessories provided. BYOB for drinks.
listings.notes: Also hosts CSC Mahjong League nights. Includes beginner pamphlet by Ruoyi Jiang.

listings.name: Congregation Habonim — Beginner Mah Jongg Class
listings.address: 103 West End Avenue, New York, NY 10023
listings.description: Four-session beginner course covering fundamentals, strategies, and social aspects of American Mah Jongg. Light snacks and refreshments provided. New classes added monthly.
listings.howToJoin: Contact Alison Fried or Carol Teig via email

listings.name: Congregation Habonim — Open Play
listings.address: 103 West End Avenue, New York, NY 10023
listings.description: Year-round open play sessions. Tuesday evenings 6:15-8:15 PM and Thursday afternoons 12:30-2:30 PM. Light snacks and refreshments provided.
listings.notes: Requires basic understanding of the game and ability to play independently.

listings.name: Congregation Rodeph Sholom — Beginner Mah Jongg
listings.description: Introduction to American-style Mah Jongg for brand-new players or those seeking a refresher. Three consecutive days of instruction; participants invited to join bi-weekly game on fourth day.
listings.notes: Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: East Wind NYC: Board Game x Mahjong Night at pinkFROG
listings.description: A weekly Tuesday night combining board games and Hong Kong mahjong at pinkFROG Café in Williamsburg — all levels welcome, $10–14 with a 1-item minimum. A social, casual night of classic HK-style tiles.

listings.name: Gaysian Tile Party
listings.description: NYC's Gayest Mahjong Club — an LGBTQ+ Asian American mahjong community hosting social mahjong events.

listings.notes: ~1,872 Instagram followers. Check Instagram for upcoming events. | Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: Green Tile Social Club
listings.description: One of NYC's hottest mahjong social clubs, founded by four Chinese, Hong Kongese, and Taiwanese-American friends. Hosts pop-up mahjong events, monthly Sunday meetups, ticketed after-parties, and supper clubs. Featured in NY Times, NBC News, Thrillist, and TODAY Show.
listings.howToJoin: Follow on Instagram for event announcements and ticket links
listings.notes: Ticket-based events. Monthly free meetups include teaching hour with open-handed gameplay for beginners.

listings.name: Mahjong King NYC

listings.howToJoin: Follow on Instagram for event announcements
listings.notes: ~1,621 Instagram followers. | Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: Mahjong Palace NYC

listings.notes: $40 per ticket guarantees a table seat. | Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: Manhattan Games Center — Private Mah Jongg Lessons
listings.address: 177 East 87th Street, Suite 302A, New York, NY
listings.description: Private Mah Jongg and Canasta lessons available at group rates.

listings.name: Manhattan Mah Jongg Club
listings.description: Private and group Mah Jongg lessons with Linda Feinstein, who has 20+ years of experience and has taught over 4,000 students. 3-week courses to learn the game. Also hosts Mah Jongg Mondays podcast.
listings.howToJoin: Contact Linda via phone or email
listings.notes: Teaches in students' homes or her own space. Also runs Mah Jongg Cruise experiences.

listings.name: Manhattan Mandarin — Mahjongg & Canasta Classes

listings.name: Marlene Meyerson JCC Manhattan — Beginner Mah Jongg
listings.description: 4-session beginner Mah Jongg series with Julie Azous, who has 20+ years of experience and a contagious passion for the game. Guided supervision through first rounds with basic understanding of pieces, rules, and strategy.
listings.howToJoin: Register by phone, in-person at Box Office, or online
listings.notes: Also offers unsupervised Mah Jongg Club for intermediate/advanced players. 60+ Cards & Games program also available. | Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: Marlene Meyerson JCC Manhattan — Mah Jongg Club
listings.description: Unsupervised Mah Jongg club-style play for players who already know the game.

listings.name: NYC Chinese-style Mahjong Meetup

listings.notes: 70 members. Skill-level matching available. No upcoming events listed at time of research. | Reclassified as one-time — no consistent schedule found

listings.name: NYPL — Mahjong Open Play (Multiple Branches)
listings.description: Free drop-in mahjong play at 10+ NYPL branches across Manhattan, Bronx, and Staten Island. Tables and chairs provided; some branches provide sets. Check the NYPL events calendar for specific branch schedules.

listings.name: OK Let's Mahjong — NYC
listings.description: Beginner-friendly private mahjong instruction brought to your location. First-time lessons: 2.5 hours, $75/person (4 players) or $60/person (8 players). Follow-ups: 2 hours, $60/person (4) or $45/person (8). Also offers social play, corporate events, and fundraisers.
listings.notes: Part of a six-state network. 24-hour cancellation policy. Gift cards available.

listings.name: OK Let's Mahjong — NYC Mahj Socials
listings.venueName: APT5 LES, San Vicente & rotating venues

listings.howToJoin: Book via Acuity scheduling on their website
listings.notes: This is separate from their MAHJ 101 lesson listings. Social events for players who already know the game.

listings.name: Riichi Nomi NYC — Sunday Open Play
listings.description: America's largest riichi mahjong club. Weekly Sunday meetups open to all skill levels. Active Discord community for announcements and matchmaking. Monthly tournaments with rankings.
listings.howToJoin: Show up on Sundays or join the Discord for announcements
listings.notes: Also has online meetups Mon and Wed nights. Riichi Nomi Open 2025 major tournament July 25-27. ~1,690 Instagram followers.

listings.name: Salmagundi Club — Mahjong
listings.description: Thursday morning Mah Jongg at one of NYC's historic fine arts clubs, founded in 1871. Members and friends welcome.
listings.notes: Historic venue in Greenwich Village. Former instructor Julie Azous (25+ years teaching).

listings.name: Sparrow's Nest Studio
listings.address: 35 W 35th St, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10001
listings.description: NYC's first dedicated mahjong venue with 16 automatic tables. Walk-ins welcome if you know how to play. Offers American, Chinese, and Japanese riichi mahjong. Private lessons and group reservations available. Over 14 years in operation.
listings.howToJoin: Walk in during open hours or reserve a table online
listings.whatToBring: Nothing — automatic tables and tiles provided
listings.notes: Peak pickup game hours 6-8 PM. Also hosts USPML qualifying events and Riichi Nomi practice sessions on Tuesdays at 6 PM.

listings.name: Sparrow's Nest Studio — Mahjong Fundamentals Lessons
listings.address: 35 W 35th St, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10001
listings.description: Learn to play mahjong fundamentals class. Covers pieces, rules, and basic strategy for beginners.

listings.name: The Mah Jongg Table — Tribeca
listings.description: Inviting and nurturing space focused on friendship, socialization, and personal connections through American Mah Jongg. Offers private and group games, lessons, parties, and events.
listings.notes: Also has a SoHo location. ~720 Instagram followers. Specific hours not publicly listed — contact directly.

listings.name: The Mahjong Society — NYC Events
listings.description: One of the largest mahjong organizers nationally. NYC events include Mahjong 101/102 beginner lessons and brewery open play nights at Dovetail and other venues. 8-10 events per month across boroughs.

listings.name: USPML — NYC Riichi Meetup
listings.address: 35 W 35th St, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10001
listings.description: US Professional Mahjong League bi-weekly riichi mahjong gathering. Running since 2010. Beginners receive 'Jumpstart' instruction. No one turned away for lack of funds.
listings.howToJoin: Register via EventBrite or show up at the door
listings.notes: 1,040+ Meetup members. Also runs quarterly league for competitive players.

listings.name: Upper East Tiles (The Mahjong Line) — Beginner Lessons

listings.name: Gilda's Club Wisconsin – Mahjong

listings.name: JCC Milwaukee – Monday Mahjong
listings.venueName: Harry & Rose Samson Family Jewish Community Center
listings.address: 6255 N Santa Monica Blvd, Whitefish Bay, WI 53217
listings.description: Monday afternoon mahjong at the JCC Milwaukee, 12-3 PM. Just $3-4 to play — a great deal for three hours of tiles in a welcoming community center. One of the most established mahjong groups in the area.

listings.name: MKE Mahjong – Social Group
listings.description: MKE Mahjong is Milwaukee's premier mahjong social group with 100+ members! They host regular open play sessions, events, and meetups at various venues across the metro. Featured on CBS58 and in the Shepherd Express — this is THE mahjong community to join in Milwaukee.
listings.howToJoin: Visit mkemahjong.com or follow @mkemahjong on Instagram for upcoming meetups and events
listings.notes: 100+ members; featured in local media; very active community

listings.name: Mahjong Monday - April
listings.description: Come play mahjong, snack, and meet new PongYos at this monthly Mahjong Monday! All ages, backgrounds, and skill levels welcome — beginners can learn on the spot.

listings.notes: Monthly event; $12/person; prizes

listings.name: Mahjong at Aroma Cafe
listings.description: Join MKE Mahjong Social Group for a cozy pop-up at Aroma Cafe — play mahjong, win prizes, meet new pong yos, and enjoy Puerto Rican coffee and pastries. Ticket includes one drink and one pastry.
